data.content: Added beads-workflow-integration.test.ts with 53 tests covering: forwardTransitionTarget across all 6 profiles, nextBeat/claimBeat across profiles with error cases, BeadsBackend.buildTakePrompt claim flow variations, BeadsBackend.buildPollPrompt priority selection, advanceGuarded dispatch. All 243+ tests pass including knots regression. Pushed to main as 271f29088b5a.
